description: Cause matrix 07: large_abstraction_compression tested on tunnel ratio 60% with 25 agents.
hypothesis: Longer corridors should increase abstraction repair length; more agents per corridor node should increase waits and conflict handling.
name: matrix_c07_r60_w110_h15_a25_s01
target_failure_hypothesis: Large compression ratio means the high-level graph hides much concrete structure.
